but didn t irritate my skin the scent wasn t over powering either has a nice fresh scent to it if you re going for completely unscented this may not be it the bad- alcohol denat is the third ingredient this is a drying alcohol which gives products a quick drying finish it s not great for the skin barrier and some studies have suggested that the long term use of drying alcohol in skincare will outweigh any immediate benefits according to paulas choi s website consequences include dryness disruption of the surface of skin s microbiome and barrier the latter being especially bad for skin and a strain on how skin replenishes renews and rejuvenates itself now people tend to be pretty split on how negatively alcohol denat is to skins long term health so for some people this ingredient being so high-up on the list won t phase them if that s the case then i think this is a great product if you re a little more ingredient picky like me this product would be a pass

i received ptr glycolic retinol resurfacing pads and serum from influenster in exchange for my honest review this review is for both products because i used them both simultaneously the pads and serum both contain a very potent combination of active ingredients mainly glycolic acid and retinol one pad is saturated enough to soak and scrub the whole face neck chest and even shoulders then follow with serum the serum is light absorbs quickly leaves a slightly tacky feeling on the face but it disappears within an hour i ve used both products for the last 2 weeks and am already seeing impressive results i have a very large sun spot on my forehead and left cheek post-acne hormonal dark spots on my jaw blackheads on the nose large pores around the nose and perioral dermatitis related to mask wear after 2 weeks of 3x a week use of both products my blackheads cleared up to a noticeable degree you can t see the black plugs anymore some whitehead acne dried up i did have the initial flare of acne after the first use as expected with acids my awful sun spot is much lighter it s still there but at least i don t need to cover it up with makeup the hormonal spots are lighter an old one completely disappeared my forehead lines aren t as noticeable as well my skin looks darn good already

this is a 100% mineral sunscreen formula that includes 20% zinc oxide non-nano laminaria saccharina hyaluronic acid niacinamide and panthenol being a physical sunscreen the whole experience is completely different to that of a chemical or combination formula and comes with its shortcomings such as it not being sweat or water resistant the presentation is great for easy transport fits most purses and the pump makes it easy to handle without much of a mess the formula is thick leaves a very faint white cast and feels incredibly hydrating however it left a more greasy rather than glowy finish on my face which is not what i m going for with it not being sweat resistant it requires constant reapplying if you re outside or it s a very hot day my main issue with that is the chalky sensation it left on my hands overall it wasn t my favorite formula but is an option if you re looking for a 100% mineral sunscreen i will probably use it up on my body but won t be repurchasing do you prefer mineral or chemical sunscreens pr gifted in exchange of my honest opinion

supergoop gifted me a complimentary glow screen body sunscreen i tried the product and overall it is different it offers shimmer the sunscreen is a cream shade and applies evenly to the skin i found it worked best after i applied moisturizer it has a rather unique scent that i can t quite pinpoint the sunscreen does have mica in it the mica is fine and blends well onto the skin depending on how much product you apply will determine how much shimmer effect i found it worked well on my legs and feet as with any sunscreen you will need to reapply if you will be outdoors for an extended period of time i can see how this supergoop glow screen body sunscreen would be appealing for the summer months the mica offers a golden shimmer the sunscreen blends out sheer and didn t leave a white cast on my skin for me i could do without the shimmer addition but found the sunscreen to be useful due to its sheer formula

and yes i definitely saw improvement in my skin starting from week one till now just for informational purposes this is an active formulation of vitamin c which is l-ascorbic acid it is one of the most studied ingredients in skincare industry and has proven benefits the problem with l-ascorbic acid is that it s very unstable which means as soon as it comes in contact with air heat etc the clock starts ticking which implies not a very long shelf life once opened it is very smart of the brand drunk elephant to come up with the idea of a deconstructed form it which means you will do the last step that is done in lab at home by mixing the powder and liquid serum base and hence making it fresh from the day you want to start using it also it is always very good idea to keep in the fridge after opening always use sunscreen after applying this serum during daytime and never use this serum at night if you have retinols in your night time skincare routine i would recommend it to everyone except people with acne prone skin or very sensitive skin please consult your dermatologist for less percentage or any stable form of vitamin c

kiehl s is one of my favorite skincare brands and this ultra facial cream with squalane did not disappoint it comes in a nice-sized tube and boasts claims to hydrate and moisturize the skin for 24 hours i find that this is to be true and when i wake up my skin feels moisturized and the hydration is still sealed in the olive-derived squalane glycerine and glacial glycoprotein helps to restore the skin s moisture barrier what really impresses me is the texture of the cream - while moisturizing it still feels light and whipped as well it absorbs well into the skin and leaves no sticky or heavy residue although this is moisturizing enough as a night cream it would be wonderful as a day cream as well and layers very well over my other skincare products and underneath makeup this would be a great formula for those with sensitive skin as there is no fragrance i would definitely recommend to my friends and family and would repurchase this product myself the price is great and affordable for a high-end skincare brand i love kiehl s product lines and the ingredients they use

i received the morning skin superpowder in exchange for my honest review of the product i was super excited to try since i ve heard of the goop brand and just finished their netflix series that showed me how carefully they evaluate beauty and science in their products these are single dose stick packs that you pour into your morning with eight ounces of water interestingly the superpowder is indeed made up for super antioxidants that support beautiful skin including vitamin c vitamin e grape seed extracts coq10 zeaxanthin and lutein it was easy to use just poured it into my morning water and it tasted light in flavor very citrusy not carbonated either which i think is a huge plus and easier to drink it made me feel good that i was drinking something that could help my body and skin glow however the experts say it takes eight to twelve weeks to start seeing results i only received five samples while it tasted good but wasn t enough product to really gauge if it worked or not i do love the idea though goop prides itself on tackling beauty and wellness from the inside out and this product exemplifies that saying that these antioxidants are able to reduce the negative effects of pollution sun and even stress it truly promotes the idea of beauty from within

cc me vitamin c serum could possibly be my new fave i ve tried both the new farmacy very cherry bright vitamin c serum along with this one and as of now i prefer summer friday s cc me serum both are clean products and both have amazing ingredient lists both have vit c and peptides however cc me includes niacinamide as the 2 ingredient i love this recently i ve been researching niacinamide the many benefits of and the best way to include in my current skin care routine the fact that cc me includes niacinamide so high on the ingredient list makes me so happy as this means i do not need to use a separate niacinamide serum after applying the vit c serum niacinamode and vit c are synergistic and can actually help enhance the effects of each other contrary to some of the old research out there even though i ve only been using this serum for a short time about a week now i am noticing positive changes my skin has less texture is smoother and my dark spots and hyperpigmentation have decreased all these benefits and i ve had zero negative side effects with my sensitive skin the picture provided on the product page shows results after using for 1 5 weeks i can say i am on track with these results and am hoping at 11 weeks my skin will appear even more clear even and bright if i could only repurchase one between farmacy s very cherry bright and summer friday s cc me vit c serum i would definitely go with cc me

this is a fantastic product especially given all the limitations that chemists and formulators are constricted by when creating a sunscreen for the us market the us is notoriously behind when it comes to sun protection the fda hasn t approved new filters in decades an issue that doesn t appear even close to changing anytime soon with all these limitations supergoop still managed to create a very elegant product with no white cast and with a texture that most people will find enjoyable to work with better yet this doubles as the perfect blurring primer for people who wear makeup even if you don t wear makeup you ll probably appreciate the diminished appearance of your pores the finish of the unseen sunscreen isn t dewy nor mattifying instead it s got a natural finish and a velvety feel i m not giving it five stars because while this has pretty high protection against uvb rays the ones that cause burning and cancer it doesn t offer much against uva rays the ones that cause wrinkles and other signs of aging at 34 for 50ml it s also very very expensive especially when sunscreen is something that needs to be reapplied throughout the day if you can afford it though i recommend

i normally don t write reviews but i feel like people aren t doing their research and are bashing a product they don t understand works retinol no matter if its trans retinol ester retin-a tretinoin or any other form can cause short term acne anybody that has gone to a dermatologist and has been prescribed a form of retinol should know that it will cause acne for a few days up to a week or two trans retinol ester will be no different for some people anti-aging products are not an overnight miracle worker they take time to work it takes time for your skin to adjust give it time to work instead of using it once and calling it a bad product when your skin doesn t look like baby skin in the morning i ve been prescribed tretinoin for a few years now and the first few uses i broke out and looked like a blotchy mess with the tretinoin but it does go away i will say luna is more gentle and i see more radiance clarity and my pores are smaller

gifted by supergoop i recently had the opportunity to try the new supergoop glowscreen spf 40 in sunset and i must say i absolutely love it the product comes in an easy-to-use tube with a pump dispenser so you can easily apply the product and have a no-mess application process the glowscreen itself is a lightweight creamy-textured sunscreen that lightly blends into skin while providing a great deal of coverage the accompanying sunset tint provides a subtle hint of color just enough to make you look like you were born with a perfect natural-looking tan upon application the glowscreen provided excellent coverage without leaving me feeling greasy or heavy instead i felt protected hydrated and glowing all thanks to the amazing ingredients green tea polyphenols and vitamin c the green tea polyphenols provide antioxidant protection from environmental damage while the vitamin c helps to brighten and even skin tone the glowscreen in sunset provides an spf of 40 so my skin was able to fight off the effects of uva uvb rays and was left feeling soft and nourished the best part i didn t have to worry about pesky flashback no matter how close i held my phone camera or the numerous zoom calls i faced i highly recommend supergoop glowscreen spf 40 in sunset to anyone looking for a lightweight sunscreen that won t leave you feeling greasy or worse having a sudden flashback while taking a picture it s the perfect solution for long-lasting protection and a natural-looking tan

i received this product for free from influenster and tula in exchange for my honest review i was so excited when this arrived since i have some trouble with many retinol products i have slightly sensitive skin and although i know the benefits of using retinol especially as i am getting into my 30 s i typically struggle with the breakouts and redness that can be associated with using such products this is an amazing alternative using natural ingredients like bakuchiol and olive-derived squalane to provide you with plump hydrated and renewed skin i used this am and pm in my routine for well over a month while using this i stopped using other acids and any retinol products and saw some really great results the label suggests using 4-5 drops and i found the dropper a bit difficult to get used to at first it takes a light touch but after a few days i had it figured out i liked that it wasn t strongly scented and had a very lightweight feel that absorbs well this serum has goji berry to help with firmness and probiotic extracts to help calm irritated skin and maintain balance for you skin barrier which worked wonders on my combination skin i really love that this product is gentle it is the perfect retinol alternative that also provides a bunch of other benefits another amazing part this is cruelty free and listed as a clean at sephora product

i received a sample of the avocado ceramide moisture barrier cleanser from glow recipe for review purposes i am 45 with dry dehydrated skin that still breaks out occasionally and is prone to hard oil-clogged pores at my temples and cheeks my primary treatment concerns are hyper-pigmentation from acne and crows feet i used the gr avocado cleanser twice a day for two weeks the cleanser was creamy yet rinsed away cleanly it s reminiscent of the herbivore cloud jelly cleanser for comparison purposes but is a touch more moisturizing the gr cleanser is a really nice final cleanser as i do use an oil balm first step second step foam cleanser then a treatment third cleanser such as one that contains glycolic acids aha pha salicylic acid or a moisturizing cleanser depending on what my skin needs i really appreciated the gr avocado cleanser on days after i d used a chemical exfoliant it was very soothing and did not cause any stinging i highly recommend this for all skin types even oily or acne-prone as i mentioned earlier it does rinse away cleanly and did not leave behind any filmy residue i also love that it has ceramides and pre postbiotics

got this product after seeing some hype about it since i am an oily skin and cystic acne sufferer for most of my late teens into 30s now i was on birth control that for sure suppressed my acne but coming off of it my skin freaked out worse than ever so discovered retinol and a passioni was my first retinol product i ve ever used tip do your research before applying the side effects are real and start slow - think it could be a bit more moisturizering felt a bit sticky and oily to rub in - even with oily skin i thought my skin was tough and could handle the product but after applying just once a week and using a bufferering layer i still peeled and had some irritation i only actually applied on my forehead and chin trouble areas because my cheeks are ok and i didn t want an entire irritated red face-only used consistently for about 2-3 months and kind of gave up was still breaking out and didn t think it was giving me the results-returned to using it again after 5 months using almost daily or taking a break when i think my skin needs it my skin is not peeling or going through major side effects anymore so i am able to combine it with my olay 24 and honest retinol and skin is doing ok still breaking out unfortunately think that will just always happen but noticed my cystic breakouts especially on my forehead are getting smaller when they first come in and flatten faster which is good -will keep with it and glad my skin is accustomed to retinol now that i can combine other vitamin a products

lancôme clarifique exfoliating hydrating face essence with glycolic acid is a great addition to my daily nightly face care routine it s a beautiful bottle which you shake to blend and bubble before pressing to your face and neck with a cotton round the bottle doesn t pour but rather releases a meager allotment into the top of the bottle by my estimate the solution will last approximately forever if you allow the bottle to dictate your usage personally i add another couple of pours to account for the cotton round absorbency the magical elixir ahem essence contains glycolic acid exfoliation grapeseed oil antioxidant and beech bud extract exfoliation and hydration i appreciate that it doesn t have parabens mineral oil sulfates silicone fragrance phenoxyethanol or colorant this essence isn t scented and has the consistency of water it does not feel oily or abrasive it does have a subtle cooling sensation as the moisture evaporates from your skin it did not irritate my sensitive skin the essence is intended to exfoliate nourish minimize the appearance of pores and make skin look smooth and radiant therefore i prepare my skin with this product before applying make-up and sunscreen to shrink pores and create a smooth and hydrated underlying surface i also use it at night after cleansing this face preparation is on par with or exceeds other products i have tried and i would recommend it to friends and family as well as buy it personally

i live in the caribbean and am constantly being attacked by equatorial sun i really needed something that would work for hot sweaty sun soaked days but also wouldn t break me out this is the one there s little to no white cast as long as you really rub it in and it doesn t pill or separate under make up added bonus it s reef safe by virtue of the fact that its mineral sunscreen which is super important to me considering all of the waste water on our little island goes right back into the ocean with this sunscreen i don t have to worry about my environmental impact on our reefs when i shower or swim 2 small drawbacks - it does leave the tiniest greasy feeling when you first apply there are a few other mineral sunscreens very few that are not quite as greasy when you first apply however that does go away pretty quickly second in my opinion this is not sweat resistant at all i m an athlete and definitely need something more sweat waterproof for days that i m working out outside all of that aside if you are looking for a good mineral based daily sunscreen - this is one of the best

i received a complementary jar of brightening moisturizer in exchange for my honest review freeproduct trywithtopbox this product is advertised a gel-to-foam cleanser that purifies the skin and tightens pores while minimizing excess sebum blackheads and imperfections it is said to have a gentle non-drying formula that features natural salicylic acid grapeseed polyphenols organic essential oils redness reducing grape water plus organic rose water to promote a healthy glow this cleanser states that the gel texture is expected to leave the skin feeling instantly fresh and clean it boasts a light and surprising natural scent derived from a unique complex of essential oils that delivers a breath of freshness with each use benefits expected with this cleanser should be purification reduction of blemishes pore tightening and reduction of excess sebum 90% of ingredients are natural in this product and no parabens phthalates or mineral oils are used i used this product for weeks it does have a really great gel-to-foam texture as advertised i tend to have naturally dry skin and while i found that this cleanser indeed made my skin feel very clean and fresh immediately after cleansing i found that it was quite drying for my skin and my skin and pores felt incredibly tight after use now for oily or combination skin types this is exactly what you d be looking for in a cleanser however for drier skin types this cleanser will prove slightly drying that said you do feel that you get a full clean with this cleanser you a feel that your pores are being tightened immediately with use and the cleanser does in fact have a light natural smelling fragrance to it

i suffer from cystic acne as well as hormonal acne this spot remover works great for the hormonal stuff i e close to the surface or with a head however it took me time and research to get into the hang of how to use it properly the salicylic acid speeds up the process of sloughing off of dead skin cells and overall skin regeneration thus after a few hours to a day all the gunk clogging your pore will rise to the surface purging this is the moment where i d previously given up thinking that the spot treatment was making my acne worse i wasn t yet familiar with the concept of purging however keep using the spot treatment for another day or two the purge will quickly wrap up and the spot will be completely clear within that day or two important notes only apply to acne spots it will wreak havoc on other areas of your face and this has little to no effect on cystic acne because they are so deep below the surface which is no fault of the product otc topical treatments generally cannot penetrate that deeply into the skin

kiehl s ferulic brew rejuvenating facial essence is as gorgeous as it is effective i was immediately drawn in by its beautifully unique look the thick brown glass bottle the spectacular amber colored essence are reminiscent of kiehl s apothecary roots i can totally picture bottles of this essence sitting on the shelves of an old-timey apothecary shop along with all the tinctutes and preparations the 3 naturally derived key ingredients found in this essence are truly some of most effective that i ve ever used comprised of ferulic acid to defend skin against free radicals and fight signs of aging lactic acid to improve skin s tone and texture and squalane oil to hydrate this facial essence brew has made my skin look and feel better than it ever has this essence absorbs quickly evenly and without leaving any tacky residue behind plus it s super lightweight it instantly refreshens my skin and it smells fantastic it has a clean earthy herbal scent that i personally adore application of this product is so easy just remember the 5 5 5 - shake bottle 5 times to properly mix pour 5 drops of essence into the palm of your hand then press onto your skin 5 times focusing on your forehead cheeks chin and neck and that s it now your skin is perfectly primed for serum and moisturizer and this essence is designed to work incredibly fast i had very visible noticeable results in just 7 days my fine lines were faded especially my crows feet laugh lines the tone of my skin was more even the texture was so much smoother and my skin had gotten the most healthy radiant youthful glow ever this essence addresses practically every skin issue i have and corrects them with speed and efficacy i truly couldn t ask for a better product i will most definitely be incorporating it into my daily skincare routine highly reccommended

i received a sample of the new sunscreen for an incentivized review with much excitement but only to find this product pilled upon every application attempt i tried different skincare products gr specific products waiting for each layer to completely dry and even on clean bare skin with no success i ve been very puzzled by the conflicting reviews and wonder if there are issues between production batches i also noticed in video promotions and with other influencers videos they do not spend much time rubbing in the product which makes me question effective application and true honest reviews are people hiding the pilling issue i also saw the gr video promotion of reapplying sunscreen by lighting tapping a beauty blender this is concerning to see since this will add very little protection even the regular promo videos use very little product this is misleading to consumers about proper sunscreen use and protection to prevent skin cancer just overall disappointed i will continue to buy my favorite products blueberry cleanser papaya balm pink juice and plum moisturizer mist and toner and try new ones in the future i ve been a long time fan of the company back to the k-beauty curation days

disclosure - i received this product as a gift from murad to review pros the packaging is portable making it very easier to carry in your purse and or beach bag it definitely does what it claims to regarding mattifying - i live in miami and tend to have a shiny t-zone especially after being out in the sun this lightweight sunscreen kept my face matte all day long did a great job with oil-control while making the enlarged pores on my nose cheeks appear noticeably blurred smaller unlike most mineral sunscreens this one also did not leave a white cast which is amazing cons this sunscreen is formulated with 4 sunscreens that are proven to be toxic to marine line coral reefs not as bad as oxybenzone but still not good for this reason i would not recommend wearing this sunscreen in the ocean or if you plan on going to the beach furthermore this product is formulated with retinyl palmitate is used in this formulation - an ingredient that there is a lot of debate over regarding the negative effects it can have on the skin when exposed to sunlight maybe the chemical sunscreens void the potentially negative effects of this ingredient however to me it seems like an odd ingredient to include in a sunscreen - why even include this in a sunscreen lastly i am not the biggest fan of artificial fragrances being added to products overall - i have used this for a couple days and really like the way it feels performs however would never advise wearing this at the beach and or in the ocean for environmental reasons
